chunks.title: Transfer of Birthright
chunks.reason: Introductory explanation regarding the shift of birthright from Reuben to Joseph and Judah.

chunks.title: Genealogy of Reuben
chunks.reason: Lineage of Reuben's sons and their descendants, concluding with their settlement in Gilead.

chunks.title: Genealogy of Gad
chunks.reason: Lineage of Gad's sons and their settlement in Bashan and Gilead.

chunks.title: War Against the Hagrites
chunks.reason: Narrative of the military campaign by Reuben, Gad, and half-Manasseh against the Hagrites.

chunks.title: Exile of Half-Manasseh
chunks.reason: Account of the half-tribe of Manasseh's lineage, their unfaithfulness, and subsequent exile.
